field.name: description
field.placeholder: Enter detailed description of the issue...

field.name: internal_note
field.placeholder: Private notes visible only to staff...

div.p: No suggested articles found. Articles are suggested based on ticket content, category, and tags.

p.small: Click on suggested articles above to view them. Use the "Linked Articles" section to link articles to this ticket.

div.p: No articles linked to this ticket. Click "Add a line" to search and link articles, or use suggested articles above.

field.name: help
field.p: Track and manage customer support tickets efficiently.

field.name: help
field.p: View and manage tickets you have created.

field.name: help
field.p: View and manage all tickets in the system.
